datasets.name: 5b1d12f2
queryLines:
-- Create an unpivoted dataset
SELECT 
    Index,
    Region,
    Date,
    Year,
    'Opening Price' as metric_name,
    Open as metric_value
FROM gsma_workspace.global_stocks_schema.gold_daily_prices

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    Index,
    Region,
    Date,
    Year,
    'High Price' as metric_name,
    High as metric_value
FROM gsma_workspace.global_stocks_schema.gold_daily_prices

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    Index,
    Region,
    Date,
    Year,
    'Low Price' as metric_name,
    Low as metric_value
FROM gsma_workspace.global_stocks_schema.gold_daily_prices

UNION ALL

SELECT 
    Index,
    Region,
    Date,
    Year,
    'Closing Price' as metric_name,
    Close as metric_value
FROM gsma_workspace.global_stocks_schema.gold_daily_prices

datasets.name: ba926980
queryLines:
select
    Index,
    Year,
    ytd_return as highest_ytd_return
from gsma_workspace.global_stocks_schema.gold_ytd_return
where ytd_return = (
    select max(ytd_return) 
    from gsma_workspace.global_stocks_schema.gold_ytd_return

datasets.name: 8e5f6ade
queryLines:
select
    Index,
    round(avg(ytd_return), 2) as avg_ytd_return
from gsma_workspace.global_stocks_schema.gold_ytd_return
group by Index
order by avg(ytd_return) desc
limit 3;

datasets.name: 7837d7bb
queryLines:
select
    Index,
    round(avg(ytd_return), 2) as avg_ytd_return
from gsma_workspace.global_stocks_schema.gold_ytd_return
group by Index
order by avg(ytd_return) asc
limit 3;

datasets.name: 885ef694
queryLines:
select
    Index,
    Year,
    round(avg(close), 2) as avg_close
from gsma_workspace.global_stocks_schema.gold_daily_prices
group by index, year;

datasets.name: 4cfa7a9b
queryLines:
select
    Index,
    Year,
    round((avg_yearly_return / volatility), 4) as risk_adjusted_return
from gsma_workspace.global_stocks_schema.gold_multi_year_performance;

datasets.name: d4a75b5e
queryLines:
select
    Index,
    Month,
    Year,
    avg_monthly_return
from gsma_workspace.global_stocks_schema.gold_avg_daily_return;

datasets.name: 4c8d9f68
queryLines:
select
    Index,
    Year,
    volatility as highest_volatility
from gsma_workspace.global_stocks_schema.gold_volatility
where volatility = (
    select max(volatility)
    from gsma_workspace.global_stocks_schema.gold_volatility

datasets.name: 24f7ad17
queryLines:
select
    Index,
    Year,
    avg_yearly_return,
    volatility,
    case
        when avg_yearly_return > 0.001 and volatility < 0.02 then "Stable & High Return"
        when avg_yearly_return > 0.001 and volatility >= 0.02 then "High Return, High Risk"
        when avg_yearly_return <= 0.001 and volatility < 0.02 then "Stable but Low Return"
        else "High Risk, Poor Return"
    end as risk_category
from gsma_workspace.global_stocks_schema.gold_multi_year_performance;

datasets.name: 9219e5aa
queryLines:
select
    Index,
    Year,
    round(avg(daily_return), 4) as avg_daily_return
from gsma_workspace.global_stocks_schema.gold_daily_prices
group by index, year;

datasets.name: 618fb3bc
queryLines:
select
    Region,
    Year,
    round(avg(daily_return), 4) as avg_daily_return
from gsma_workspace.global_stocks_schema.gold_daily_prices
group by region, year;

datasets.name: c3999af7
queryLines:
select
    Index,
    round(avg(ytd_return), 2) as avg_ytd_return
from gsma_workspace.global_stocks_schema.gold_ytd_return
group by Index
order by avg(ytd_return) desc;

datasets.name: summary_overview
queryLines:
-- Comprehensive summary metrics across all indices
SELECT
  Index,
  Region,
  -- Performance metrics
  ROUND(AVG(daily_return), 4) as avg_daily_return,
  ROUND(AVG(ytd_return), 2) as avg_ytd_return,
  -- Volatility metrics
  ROUND(AVG(volatility), 4) as avg_volatility,
  ROUND(AVG(avg_yearly_return), 4) as avg_yearly_return,
  -- Risk-adjusted return
  ROUND(AVG(avg_yearly_return / NULLIF(volatility, 0)), 4) as risk_adjusted_return,
  -- Classification
  CASE
    WHEN
      AVG(avg_yearly_return) > 0.001
      AND AVG(volatility) < 0.02
    THEN
      'Stable & High Return'
    WHEN
      AVG(avg_yearly_return) > 0.001
      AND AVG(volatility) >= 0.02
    THEN
      'High Return, High Risk'
    WHEN
      AVG(avg_yearly_return) <= 0.001
      AND AVG(volatility) < 0.02
    THEN
      'Stable but Low Return'
    ELSE 'High Risk, Poor Return'
  END as overall_risk_category
FROM
  (
    SELECT
      p.Index,
      p.Region,
      p.daily_return,
      y.ytd_return,
      m.volatility,
      m.avg_yearly_return
    FROM
      gsma_workspace.global_stocks_schema.gold_daily_prices p
        LEFT JOIN gsma_workspace.global_stocks_schema.gold_ytd_return y
          ON p.Index = y.Index
          AND p.Year = y.Year
        LEFT JOIN gsma_workspace.global_stocks_schema.gold_multi_year_performance m
          ON p.Index = m.Index
          AND p.Year = m.Year
  )
GROUP BY
  Index,
  Region
ORDER BY
  avg_ytd_return DESC

lines:
# Global Stock Market Performance Analysis

Comprehensive analysis of major global indices: performance trends, YTD returns, and country rankings

frame.title: Multi-Year Index Performance (Measured by Avg Metric Value)

lines:
# Global Stock Market Time-Based Trends

Comprehensive analysis of major global indices: closing price trends, index growth, and trends across months and years

# Global Stock Market Volatility & Risk Analysis

Comprehensive analysis of major global indices: volatility patterns,  market stability assessment, and highest volatility recorded.

# Country & Regional Comparisons

Comparative analysis of major global indices: daily returns, regional differences, and long-term performance across countries

frame.title: Daily Return of Regional Differences Over Time

lines:
## Executive Summary: Global Stock Market Insights (2000-2026)

**Key Findings Across All Markets:**

**Performance Leaders:**

* **Turkey (BIST100)** leads with 38.62% average YTD returns and highest risk-adjusted returns (6.9%)
* **India (NIFTY50)** shows strong consistent growth with 19.04% YTD and excellent risk-adjusted performance
* **Brazil (BOVESPA)** demonstrates resilience with 23.89% YTD despite emerging market volatility

**Regional Patterns:**

* **Asia** shows highest growth potential but with elevated volatility
* **Europe** exhibits moderate, stable returns with lower risk profiles
* **North America** maintains steady performance with balanced risk-return characteristics

**Risk & Volatility:**

* **Highest volatility recorded:** Turkey experienced significant market swings driven by economic reforms
* **Most stable markets:** Germany (DAX40), UK (FTSE100), and USA (SP500) show consistent low-volatility patterns
* **Risk categories:** 40% of indices classified as "Stable & High Return", 20% as "High Return, High Risk"

**Time-Based Trends:**

* **Long-term growth:** Clear upward trajectory in closing prices across all major indices post-2009
* **Seasonal patterns:** Monthly return analysis reveals Q4 strength and January volatility across markets
* **Crisis recovery:** All markets showed V-shaped recovery post-2020, with emerging markets rebounding faster

filters.expression: `overall_risk_category` IN ('Stable & High Return', 'Stable but Low Return')
